title: Jeremy Ho
content:
People.ContactEmail jho@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2015
- University of Victoria
Jeremy Ho is a trusted advisor on complex tax matters, known for delivering strategic, business-focused solutions that help clients achieve their immediate and long term objectives.
Jeremy Ho* is a Partner in our National Tax Group. Based in Vancouver, Jeremy’s practice encompasses all aspects of corporate income tax planning, with a particular focus on public and private mergers and acquisitions, corporate reorganizations, private equity transactions, executive compensation and inbound and outbound investments. He frequently advises on the tax implications of establishing and operating businesses in Canada, and is sought out for his ability to anticipate challenges and design practical, innovative strategies that align with business goals.
With deep technical expertise and extensive experience advising multinational enterprises, public and private companies, and private equity funds, Jeremy provides tailored guidance across a range of industries, including technology, financial services, agribusiness, life sciences, energy, mining, infrastructure, consumer goods and retail.
An active contributor to the Firm’s Tax Perspectives blog, Jeremy regularly writes on topics such as federal budget developments, industry tax credits, and legislative changes impacting business operations and investments.  As a frequent speaker within the tax community, he has presented at various conferences, including for the Canadian Tax Foundation and the International Fiscal Association.
He is a member of the Canadian Tax Foundation, the International Fiscal Association, the Law Society of British Columbia, and the Canadian Bar Association. He has completed the Chartered Professional Accountants of Canada’s In-Depth Tax Program and holds a JD from the University of Victoria and a BSc in Biochemistry from the University of British Columbia.
*denotes Law Corporation
